description_long: This is a small, stylized bungalow with a raised wooden platform and a prominent front porch accessed by a short staircase. The structure features a tiled, dark gray gable roof with decorative pastel-colored end caps and wooden support beams. The front facade has a central red door, a small window to the right, and wooden railings enclosing the porch. The sides and rear of the bungalow are simpler, with minimal windows and a few decorative pots placed on the back platform. The walls are painted in warm beige and terracotta tones, and the overall design suggests a blend of traditional East Asian and cartoon-like architectural influences. The building appears compact, single-storied, and suitable for residential use in a neighborhood or park setting.
description: A compact, stylized bungalow with a tiled gable roof, raised wooden porch, and warm-toned walls, featuring decorative roof ends and a central front door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, red door, porch with railings, and a small window to the right.
description_view_1: Rear gable view with decorative roof ends, plain wall, and partial porch railing visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the extended roof, plain wall, and a glimpse of pots at the back.
description_view_3: Back view with two decorative pots, a small window, and the rear section of the porch and railing.
